spec_match.rationale: Directly models the mathematical behavior of abs() for magnitude and sign() for directional transformation.

interactive.rationale: Slider provides immediate real-time visual changes along a negative-to-positive scale axis.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly represents the basic functions in their rawest form.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully supports crossing zero, which collapses the directional bar correctly without rendering errors.

references.rationale: Cites official spec draft and ChromeStatus entry links.

design_system.rationale: Appropriately uses standard design system variables for borders, spaces, and backgrounds.

summary: A pure, direct validation of the CSS abs() and sign() math functions. It uses a custom CSS property offset, transforming magnitude to absolute width and direction to sign-based scaleX, successfully showcasing the spec contracts.
